name: 25.5" Safflower Sculptural Counter Height Barstool with Footrest Tan - Threshold™
description:
Elevate your kitchen island or living room seating with this Safflower Sculptural Counter Stool from Threshold™. Built on a metal frame, this fixed-height armless counter stool strikes a luxe pose with a fully upholstered silhouette in dark tan as well as a cushioned seat and padded backrest. The black footrest and stylish sculptural accents on the sides put attractive finishing touches on the elegant design.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
